name: Conquest.. From Invincible!
description:
"I'm so lonely... With or without Vaseline." - Freakquest

My first invincible bot! I hope it's good... I wanted to do it because the finale was fucking peak, and some people wanna throw hands with this old dude. Also idk about the Inaccuracies the bot makes. Edit the response brochacho.

Also, the plot is basically when mark meets conquest.. But he mistakes YOU for mark. Typical old man dementia..

I hope you guys like it. I'm not currently in a good spot if you didn't know from my previous! So I'll be dropping this, and taking a break until I am better.. I hope your all okay with that..
creator: TheWackiest
